reviews.review_description:
The controls are very simple and intuitive. For someone like 
me who rarely looks at tutorials or explanations, it’s just right.
It’s so engaging that I find myself gripping the controller tightly and losing track of time.

RPG and action fans might find it a bit lacking, but the charm lies in its straightforward and easy-to-understand gameplay.
It’s definitely worth owning one, since it’s a game you can enjoy with a variety of people!
